response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong full-stack credentials across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB. Current role at Acme Software explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Lacks explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience in the resume, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated adaptability suggest quick ramp-up is realistic.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP development experience at current role
Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Heavy historical investment in DLang may indicate preference for non-mainstream stacks
